GpuProjectExec: expr=[call_center@0 as call_center, call_center_name@1 as call_center_name, manager@2 as manager, returns_loss@3 as returns_loss]
  GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [sum(catalog_returns.cr_net_loss)@4 DESC]
    GpuSortExec: expr=[sum(catalog_returns.cr_net_loss)@4 DESC]
      GpuProjectExec: expr=[cc_call_center_id@0 as call_center, cc_name@1 as call_center_name, cc_manager@2 as manager, sum(catalog_returns.cr_net_loss)@5 as returns_loss, sum(catalog_returns.cr_net_loss)@5 as sum(catalog_returns.cr_net_loss)]
        GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[cc_call_center_id, cc_name, cc_manager, cd_marital_status, cd_education_status], aggr=[sum(catalog_returns.cr_net_loss)]
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5835553
            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([cc_call_center_id@0, cc_name@1, cc_manager@2, cd_marital_status@3, cd_education_status@4], 8), input_partitions=8
              GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[cc_call_center_id, cc_name, cc_manager, cd_marital_status, cd_education_status], aggr=[sum(catalog_returns.cr_net_loss)]
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5835553
                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(hd_demo_sk@0, c_current_hdemo_sk@4)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5835553
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([hd_demo_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5835553
                          GpuFilterExec: predicate=hd_buy_potential@1 LIKE Unknown%, projection=[0]
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=5835553
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5835553
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_current_hdemo_sk@4], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5835553

                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5835553
                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_current_cdemo_sk@4], 8), input_partitions=8
                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5835553

                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5835553
                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_current_addr_sk@6], 8), input_partitions=8
                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5835553
                                          GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(cr_returning_customer_sk@3, c_customer_sk@0)], projection=[0, 1, 2, 4, 6, 7, 8]
                                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5835553
                                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([cr_returning_customer_sk@3], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5835553
                                                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, cr_returned_date_sk@3)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 5, 6]
                                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5835553
                                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

                                                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=5835553
                                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5835553

                                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=5835553
--- memory ---
GpuProjectExec: row_width=112, subtree_max_row_bytes=368
  GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=128, subtree_max_row_bytes=368
    GpuSortExec: row_width=128, subtree_max_row_bytes=368
      GpuProjectExec: row_width=128, subtree_max_row_bytes=368
